event: A Car Approaching on a Country Road at Dusk
description: A realist painting of a straight country road receding into the distance at dusk. A car with bright yellow headlights approaches from the middle distance. Road posts line both sides. A single tree with silvery-white foliage stands at right, illuminated. The flat landscape stretches to the horizon under a sky that transitions from pale pink at the horizon to blue above, with scattered clouds. In the immediate foreground, a metal gate or barrier sits at the road's edge. The mood is quiet and still.
